mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume_shares (resume_id, share_token, expires_at, view_count, is_active) VALUES (#{resumeId}, #{shareToken}, #{expiresAt}, #{viewCount}, #{isActive})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM resume_shares WHERE id = #{id} AND resume_id = #{resumeId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM resume_shares WHERE id = #{id} AND resume_id = #{resumeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE resume_shares SET is_active = #{isActive} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE resume_shares SET expires_at = #{expiresAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE resume_shares SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT rs.id, rs.resume_id, rs.share_token, rs.expires_at, rs.view_count, rs.is_active, rs.created_at FROM resume_shares rs INNER JOIN resumes r ON rs.resume_id = r.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY rs.created_at DESC
